ctionException Join a matrix of matrices into a single matrix by tiling. All matrices in the matrix must be of the same type, the same type as this matrix. But none of them needs to actually be this matrix. This base class simply throws an ex

this matrix. This base class simply throws an exception. Derived classes provide the implementation. The number of columns in the resulting matrix is the sum of the number of columns in the first row of the argument. The number of rows in the

t row of the argument. The number of rows in the resulting matrix is the sum of the number of rows in the first column of the argument. The matrices are copied into the result starting at the position determined by the first row or column.

position determined by the first row or column. If the matrices overlap, then while copying left to right, top-to-bottom, data will be overwritten. If there are gaps, the resulting matrix will be filled with zeros. Overrides: join in class Matr
